name: 150 Watt LED Shoebox Light | 24000 Lumens | 5700K
description: 150 Watt LED shoebox light – parking lot light has durable die-cast aluminum housing and stainless steel hardware. The standard optic is Type 3 – perfect for parking lots. The fixture comes in a dark bronze finish. There is also a photocell you can order if you want dusk-to-dawn operation.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage: 150 Lumens: 24000 Lumens Per Watt: 160 Replaces: 400 or 1000 Watt Metal Halide Voltage: 100V-277V or 277V-480V Optional Color Temperature: 5700K CRI: 70+ Dimming: No Beam Angles: Type 5 Standard, Type 3 Optional Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 244,000 (L70) hours Mounting: Wall or Yoke or Arm or Slip Fitter EPA Rating: 1.5 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50-60Hz Power Factor: > .92 THD: < 15% Durable Construction Housing: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 IK Rating: IK08 Surge Protection: 6kV line-line, 10kV line-earth Operating Temperature: -22°F to +113°F Certifications: ETL | DLC Premium Warranty: 10 (100-277v) – 5 (277-480v) years Measurements Dimensions: 15.63 X 11.25 X 3.22 in Weight: 9.5 lbs Cord Length: 5 Feet Features/Accessories Motion Sensor Photocell
